---
title: "tba_extracted"
format: html
---

```{r}
qual_matches <- event_matches("2026week0") |>
    filter(comp_level == "qm") |>
    data_frame()

extract_auto <- function(x) {
  x$autoCount
}

extract_teleop <- function(x) {
  x$teleopCount
}

blue_auto_fuel <- sapply(qual_matches[[32]], extract_auto)
blue_tele_fuel <- sapply(qual_matches[[32]], extract_teleop)

red_auto_fuel <- sapply(qual_matches[[55]], extract_auto)
red_tele_fuel <- sapply(qual_matches[[55]], extract_teleop)


extracted_data <- data.frame(Match = qual_matches$match_number, 
                             blue_auto_fuel = blue_auto_fuel,
                             blue_tele_fuel = blue_tele_fuel,
                             red_auto_fuel = red_auto_fuel,
                             red_tele_fuel = red_tele_fuel)

view(extracted_data)

```
